mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an accommodative monetary policy stance that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in unemployment rate above 4.5% indicates deteriorating labor market conditions, which depress corporate earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the federal funds rate and rising inflation expectations (CPIAUCSL) signal a 'stagflation' risk scenario, causing equity market volatility and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for combined FEDFUNDS/CPIAUCSL signal drops below 0.05 over 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 105.0 indicates strengthening manufacturing activity, which supports corporate profits and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 150k signals robust labor market demand, which boosts consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS signal falls below 0.02 over 1-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 1200k indicates weakening demand for construction, which signals lower economic activity and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in real sales (RSAFS) combined with rising GDP (GDPC1) indicates strong economic growth, which drives equity market optimism and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for combined RSAFS/GDPC1 signal drops below 0.05 over 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 105.0 during a monetary tightening cycle signals resilient supply-side dynamics, which offset rate hikes and generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances during rate hikes.
